text:
The starship Enterprise disappeared into a wormhole, never to be seen again.

That is until seven years later when a group of archaeologists discovered the starship on the moon Base Alpha-Five.

They had built the ship using modern technology, but everything else was vintage 2240s. They called it the Friendship 5 before launching it on a mission to Mars.

During the mission, the crew was on the verge of discovery when they got stuck on a planet made entirely of ice.

One pilot dove into the water to rescue a crew member. During his dive, he realized that there were giant ice creatures lurking below. Suddenly, the water became very dark.

The pilot broke through the ice only to find a huge penguin standing over him, looking kind of sad. It whispered in some unknown language about how some ancient people dug here long ago. That's when the pilot started singing about friendship.

The penguin nodded solemnly and disappeared into the water. The pilot dove back up.
